summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard capture of a legendary acoustic/electric set with standout renditions of Deep Elum, On The Road Again and Heaven Help The Fool.
review: The recording is praised as crisp, sweet and expertly transferred, delivering an excellent soundboard experience. Fans highlight the acoustic set’s magic – especially “Deep Elum,” “On the Road Again,” “To Lay Me Down” and the instrumental “Heaven Help the Fool” – and note a strong electric portion featuring guest drummer Bill Cobham, showing the band fully comfortable in this hybrid format.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviews are highly favorable (4‑5 stars) and specifically commend both the musical performance and the pristine soundboard transfer, leaving little doubt of a top‑tier show and recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as crisp, sweet, clear and a great transfer; no complaints about noise, drop‑outs or balance.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The band shows confidence in the acoustic/electric hybrid format, moving smoothly from a spirited acoustic set into a powerful electric portion with guest drummer Bill Cobham, keeping the crowd rowdy and engaged throughout.

band_member_comments.Drums: Bill Cobham guesting on drums is noted as a unique highlight of this performance.
